name: The Ruy Lopez
description: Line trainer for the Ruy Lopez, generated from the canonical opening database (lichess-org/chess-openings): 87 positions drilled book-move by book-move from White's side across 193 named variations. Cards are introduced shallow-to-deep, shuffled across lines within each depth; the back gives the line so far, the variation name and ECO code.
